title: V1.16.0 -> v1.16.0
body:
<!--
If you are reporting a new issue, make sure that we do not have any duplicates
already open. You can ensure this by searching the issue list for this
repository. If there is a duplicate, please close your issue and add a comment
to the existing issue instead.

If you suspect your issue is a bug, please edit your issue description to
include the BUG REPORT INFORMATION shown below. If you fail to provide this
information within 7 days, we cannot debug your issue and will close it. We
will, however, reopen it if you later provide the information.

---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST
-->

**Description**

Should https://github.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/V1.16.0 be tagged as https://github.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/v1.16.0 (regex friendly as previous version)?

comments.body:
If possible, if this happens again, could you keep the old (wrong) tag as well? It broke our builds since we have already started to use the `V` version.

I know that the fix is trivial, but still...

Thanks for reaching out, and apologies for breaking!

Absolutely. We'll be careful next time. The GitHub interface seems to really rename the tag. Next time, we'll do it manually and keep the old tag around :+1:

@graywolf-at-work I'll echo what @vrothberg said and also thank you for leting us know.  That was not something I'd on my radar as a possible problem with that change.  I'll keep that in back of mind going forward.
